data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Annual renewal requirement' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the annual renewal requirement, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm its existence, this indicates a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of functionality or endpoints related to the annual renewal requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the annual renewal requirement.
